text:
Once upon a time, in a little village hidden behind ancient woods, there lived a wise owl named owlelda. She had feathered friends—who became her chatterbox friends—orkus, fuzzball. They talked incessantly.

One moonlit evening, owlisphere felt empty after owlkus' retreat to feathers.

"It's boring," Owlelda said.

"You mean owl sleepy." They hooted mockingly.

She dreamed weird stuff.

One dream. Lost. Found foxie.

There. In a bush. Orange!

Followed owl.

No fear. Odd friendship.

They sat. Chat.

Soon. Secrets.

One. My tongue hurts.

No worry.

Just eat berries.

That's sage.

They grew.

Everywhere.

Now my own.

With wings.

I soar.

Forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
